policy.replan_rule: When repo structure changes, run `make writeback-apply WRITE=1` before continuing.

contract.purpose: Exclude generated index artifacts, Python bytecode, and OS files from version control
contract.invariants: Must include .index/ and __pycache__/; never track generated artifacts
contract.verification: No gitignored files appear in git status

contract.purpose: Project-specific instructions for Claude Code — key commands, architecture overview, and rules
contract.invariants: Must stay in sync with actual commands and architecture; must include the zero-dependencies and no-personal-info rules
contract.verification: All commands listed are valid make targets; rules match project conventions

contract.purpose: MIT license granting usage, modification, and distribution rights
contract.invariants: Must remain MIT; copyright line must not contain personal identifiers
contract.verification: File exists and contains standard MIT text

contract.purpose: Task orchestration layer exposing all guardrails operations as make targets
contract.invariants: All targets delegate to engine/index.py or scripts/worktree.sh; no business logic in Makefile itself; every target listed in make help
contract.verification: make help lists all targets; each target runs without error on a clean repo

contract.purpose: Project overview, quick start guide, and command reference for new users
contract.invariants: Must document all make targets; examples must use generic non-domain-specific code; no personal info or origin-project references
contract.verification: All commands listed match actual Makefile targets

contract.purpose: Persistent ledger tracking per-file contracts (purpose/invariants/verification) and maturity stages
contract.invariants: Schema must include version, policy, entries array; every tracked file has exactly one entry; no placeholder TODO values in shipped contracts
contract.verification: make verify passes both structure_contract_coverage and changed_file_contract_semantics gates

contract.purpose: Core engine implementing the mirror/atlas/contracts/writeback/gates pipeline using Python stdlib only
contract.invariants: Zero external dependencies; all gate output uses GATE_PASS/GATE_FAIL structured format; config read from guardrails.yaml; no hardcoded domain-specific paths
contract.verification: make start, make verify, and make writeback-apply WRITE=1 all complete without error

contract.purpose: Project-level configuration for ledger path, exclusions, protected branches, and gate settings
contract.invariants: All paths relative to repo root; must be parseable by the built-in YAML parser in engine/index.py; no personal info or machine-specific paths
contract.verification: engine/index.py loads config without error; all referenced paths resolve correctly

contract.purpose: Task isolation via git worktrees — creates, monitors, and closes per-task sandboxes
contract.invariants: Never operates on protected branches; all output uses structured TASK_* format; no hardcoded branch prefixes beyond task/docs/workflow
contract.verification: task-open creates worktree; task-status reports correct metrics; task-close suggests correct next action
